---
name: Specification change
about: Propose a change to the ATAH specification, schemas, OpenAPI, or MCP tools
title: '[SPEC] '
labels: specification-change
assignees: ''
---

## What's affected

Which schemas, endpoints, or sections are affected?

## Problem

What is the problem this change addresses?

## Proposed change

What change do you propose?

## Compatibility

- [ ] Non-breaking (could land in v0.8.x)
- [ ] Breaking (requires v0.9 or v1.0)

If breaking, describe the migration path.

## Backwards-compatibility considerations

What existing implementations would be affected?

## Discussion thread

Have you opened a discussion thread for this change? Substantive proposals
should start in Discussions before opening a PR. Link the thread here.
